title: Risograph Misprint
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for Risograph misprint aesthetics, testing structured layout, paper-and-ink physics, photoreal print mockups, and two-to-three-color style transfer.

zh-CN.title: Risograph 丝网错版印刷
zh-CN.description: 测试荧光粉、钴蓝、黑色三色分版，1-2mm 故意错位、颗粒 halftone、纸张纤维和 80 年代 zine 质感。
